title: Medical Genetics and Molecular Diagnosis Laboratory

In our Medical Genetics and Molecular Diagnosis Laboratory, molecular studies are carried out at the R&D level to determine many biological conditions, including diseases, and to use them for therapeutic purposes. In addition to these studies, molecular studies of postgraduate theses are also carried out in our laboratory, which is open to all our academicians. High-level and fully equipped devices are used in the realization of DNA, RNA and protein-based analyzes. In our laboratory, genotyping studies that can be used to determine predispositions to diseases caused by genetic variations (Polymorism and Mutations) and studies and theses to create molecular diagnostic kits are carried out and support our country's 2023 vision with the motto of creating a national diagnostic kit.

The most important outcome of the molecular era is the development of Individualized Treatment and Molecular Diagnostic Kits. In this context, we attach importance to the R&D studies of new test kits that will further strengthen the patient-physician relationship with the studies we carry out.

In our laboratory, DNA, RNA and protein isolations from tissue samples, polymorphism and expression analysis, eletrophoresis, PCR and Real-time PCR experiments are performed.
